title: centaurium tenuiflorum var. acutiflorum
intro: Centaurium tenuiflorum var. acutiflorum, also known as the Greater Yellow Centaury or Yellow Centaury, is a flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its ability to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Centaurium tenuiflorum var. acutiflorum include its potential to treat conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve the use of its flowers and leaves in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
